p.strong: Complete path from application write() to reliable byte delivery

ul.li: TAP File Descriptor: The bridge between userspace and the kernel tunnel.
Connection Lookup: 4-tuple matching (src_ip, src_port, dst_ip, dst_port).
Packet Processing: Decapsulation from Ethernet -> IP -> TCP.

g.text: 0x08 | uint32_t | snd_nxt // Next sequence to send
Receiver advertises rcv_wnd to prevent sender overflow.
Sender adjusts cwnd based on packet loss/ACKs.
